SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement is made on the 15th day of October 2023

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S8765432F, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, contact number +65 9123 4567, email: emily.tan@fictmail.sg

2. GreenTech Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: 198765432A, a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 456 Marina Boulevard, #33-01, Singapore 018987, represented by Mr. John Lim, contact number +65 9876 5432, email: john.lim@greentech.sg

3. Ms. Linda Chua, NRIC No. S7654321B, residing at 789 Bukit Timah Road, #05-67, Singapore 258765, contact number +65 9988 7766, email: linda.chua@singnet.sg

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to invest an aggregate amount of SGD 1,000,000 in the joint venture company, EcoDynamics Solutions Pte Ltd, UEN: T12LL3456L, for the purpose of developing sustainable energy technologies.
